---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Welcome to my research website.
# CMHEF versus CMDEF snRNA-seq analysis

This website documents the processing and quality control of the snRNA-seq dataset.

## Analyses

- [Initial preprocessing, clustering, and first QC](CMHEF_vs_CMDEF_exp3_6__first_QC.html)
